docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISIDORO, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT TREMILLO, YURIRIA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
